title: DataSrcDataModelFieldMap - Metadata API
description: Represents the mappings between source data lake object (DLO) fields and target data model object (DMO) fields.

filterApplied.description: Indicates whether a filter is applied to a DLO-to-DMO field mapping (true) or not (false). Available in API version 60.0 and later.

filterOperationType.description: Required when filterApplied is true. The comparison operator used when filtering the DLO-to-DMO field mapping. Available in API version 60.0 and later.

filterValue.description: Required when filterApplied is true. The value used for filtering the DLO-to-DMO field mapping. Available in API version 60.0 and later.

masterLabel.description: A user-friendly name for DataSrcDataModelFieldMap, which is defined when the DataSrcDataModelFieldMap is created.

sourceField.description: The developer name of the DLO field.

targetField.description: The developer name of the DMO field.

templateVersion.description: The version number of the field mapping template. Available in API version 61.0 and later.

versionNumber.description: The version number of the DataSrcDataModelFieldMap.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a DataSrcDataModelFieldMap component.
